name: Total notional quantity—Leg 1
description: The aggregate notional quantity of the underlier of Leg 1 for the entire term of the transaction.
format: Conforms to 2024 Rules specifications; 'all 9s' is an allowable value.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI, if applicable.
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: Required for Asset class of COMM and EQUI and Action type of NEWT, MODI, CORR and REVI.

If Notional quantity—Leg 1 is reported, Total notional quantity—Leg 1 is at least approximately, if not exactly, equal to Notional quantity—Leg 1 multiplied by the number of periods indicated by Payment frequency period—Leg 1 and Payment frequency period multiplier—Leg 1 (if reported).
If the value(s) for these data elements is not known at the time of reporting, ‘all 9s’ is reported, but is updated to the amount subsequently determined, using a MODI-TRAD report.
